allow: Bash(node -e "const l = require\('lucide-react'\); const keys = Object.keys\(l\).filter\(k => !k.startsWith\('Lucide'\) && !k.endsWith\('Icon'\)\).slice\(0, 20\); console.log\('Sample:', keys.join\(', '\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const si = require\('simple-icons'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(si\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('azure'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('openai'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('playwright'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('zustand'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('framer'\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const si = require\('simple-icons'\); const keys = Object.keys\(si\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('azure'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('openai'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('playwright'\) || k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('microsoft'\)\); console.log\(keys\)")

Bash(node -e 'const si = require\('\\''simple-icons'\\''\); const keys = Object.keys\(si\).filter\(k => ['\\''siAzure'\\'','\\''siOpenai'\\'','\\''siPlaywright'\\'','\\''siMicrosoftazure'\\''].includes\(k\)\); console.log\(keys\); // Also check titles *)

Bash(node -e "const si = require\('simple-icons'\); const entries = Object.entries\(si\).filter\(\([k,v]\) => v && v.title && \(v.title.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('azure'\) || v.title.toLowerCase\(\).includes\('devops'\)\)\); console.log\(entries.map\(\([k,v]\) => k + ': ' + v.title\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const si = require\('simple-icons'\); const keys = Object.keys\(si\); console.log\(keys.filter\(k => k.startsWith\('siA'\)\).slice\(0,30\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const si = require\('simple-icons'\); console.log\(si.siReact.hex, si.siNextdotjs.hex, si.siGit.hex\)")

Bash(node -e "const si = require\('simple-icons'\); const keys = Object.keys\(si\); const matching = keys.filter\(k => si[k] && si[k].title && si[k].title.toLowerCase\(\).match\(/azure|microsoft/\)\); console.log\(matching.map\(k => k + ': ' + si[k].title\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const si = require\('simple-icons'\); console.log\(si.siMicrosoftazure ? 'found azure' : 'not found'\); console.log\(si.siAzuredevops ? 'found devops' : 'not found'\); console.log\(si.siDocker ? 'docker found: ' + si.siDocker.hex : 'no docker'\)")
